step_rationale: Thrombin receptor on platelets and endothelium; direct mediator of coagulation-triggered platelet activation.
mechanism: G-protein-coupled receptor activated by thrombin; drives both platelet activation and endothelial pro-inflammatory signaling during thrombosis.
